channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Uber CTO Joins StrictlyVC San Francisco Lineup for April 30 Event
item.description: Uber Chief Technology Officer Praveen Neppalli Naga has been added to the speaker lineup for the StrictlyVC San Francisco event on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center.

item.title: Nothing Launches On-Device AI Dictation Tool Supporting Over 100 Languages
item.description: Consumer electronics company Nothing has released a new AI-powered dictation feature that processes speech locally and supports more than 100 languages.

item.title: Spyware Vendor Found Distributing Fake Android Apps to Install Surveillance Software
item.description: Security researchers have identified another instance of a commercial spyware company using fraudulent Android applications to covertly install tracking tools on targeted devices.

item.title: DeepSeek Previews New AI Models Approaching Performance of Leading Systems
item.description: DeepSeek says its new models are more efficient and capable than its earlier V3.2 release, with architectural improvements bringing performance closer to top frontier AI systems.

item.title: Meta Signs Deal for Millions of Amazon AI Processors for Agentic Workloads
item.description: Meta has secured a large allocation of Amazon's proprietary CPUs for AI agent applications, a move analysts say signals a new phase in the competition for AI computing resources.
